Author: Pistachio Herald
Name: Cards Against Hyurmanity
Description: Play cards against humanity over game chat. Type /cah to open the main window.
TestingChangelog: - Added a button to continue the game where you left it. - Added more cards
Changelog:
- Added some cards
- Added button to add host as a player
- Added /yell and /shout channels. Use at your own risk
- Improved UI looks
- Reduced the list of recognized verbs to verbs not used as noun ever
- Added a button that prints a short "How to play" guide
- Added more spacing to white cards for better readability
